title: Crisp Garlicky Slovakian Tiger Prawns
description: A cozy and garlicky dish featuring raw tiger prawns with a touch of fermentation for an authentic Slovakian twist. Perfect as a snack to start your day.

ingredients.name: Raw tiger prawns
ingredients.notes: Make sure they are at room temperature

ingredients.name: Fermented vegetables (e.g. sauerkraut)
ingredients.notes: Use any vegan-friendly fermented product available

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Extra virgin for best flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley leaves
ingredients.notes: For garnish, stems can be removed if desired

instructions: Place the tiger prawns in a shallow dish.
In another small bowl, mix minced garlic with the olive oil and sauerkraut until well combined.
Gently toss the prawns to coat evenly with the garlic-oil mixture. Let sit for about 10 minutes.
Sprinkle fresh parsley on top of each prawn for garnish.
Serve immediately while the prawns are still raw and crisp.
